---
title: "Publications"
page-layout: full
toc: true
bibliography: ./Info/Bib/journal.bib
nocite: |
  @*
filters:
  - author-format.lua
---

<sup>†</sup>: First author, <sup>✻</sup>: Corresponding author, <span style="color: #0066cc; font-weight: 600;">Blue</span>: Lab member

::: {#refs}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const refsDiv = document.getElementById("refs");
  if (!refsDiv) return;

  const bibDataEl = document.getElementById("bib-data");
  if (!bibDataEl) return;
  const bibData = JSON.parse(bibDataEl.textContent);
  const labMembers = bibData._labMembers || [];

  const entries = Array.from(refsDiv.querySelectorAll("div.csl-entry"));
  if (entries.length === 0) return;

  const items = entries.map(div => {
    const key = div.id.replace("ref-", "");
    const yearMatch = key.match(/(\d{4})/);
    const year = yearMatch ? parseInt(yearMatch[1]) : 0;
    const data = bibData[key] || {};
    const bibOrder = data.order || 9999;
    return { div, key, year, bibOrder, data };
  });

  // Separate submitted vs published
  const submitted = items.filter(i => i.data.status);
  const published = items.filter(i => !i.data.status);

  // Sort published: year descending, bib order ascending within same year
  published.sort((a, b) => {
    if (a.year !== b.year) return b.year - a.year;
    return a.bibOrder - b.bibOrder;
  });

  // Sort submitted: bib order ascending (newest first in bib)
  submitted.sort((a, b) => a.bibOrder - b.bibOrder);

  // Process each entry (shared logic)
  function processEntry(item) {
    const authorship = item.data.authorship || "";
    const doi = item.data.doi || "";
    const bibAuthors = item.data.authors || "";
    const status = item.data.status || "";
    let suffix = "";
    if (/First/i.test(authorship)) suffix += "†";
    if (/Corresponding/i.test(authorship)) suffix += "✻";

    let html = item.div.innerHTML;

    // Fix em-dash substitution (———.)
    let replacedEmDash = false;
    if (/^\s*———\./.test(html)) {
      html = html.replace(/^\s*———\./, bibAuthors + ".");
      replacedEmDash = true;
    }

    // Fix first author "Family, Given" -> "Given Family"
    if (!replacedEmDash) {
      html = html.replace(
        /^(\s*)([A-Z][a-zA-Zé\u00C0-\u024F-]+),\s+([A-Z][a-zA-Zé\u00C0-\u024F\s.-]+?)(?=,\s|\.?\s+\d{4})/,
        function(match, ws, family, given) {
          return ws + given.trim() + " " + family;
        }
      );
    }

    // Bold "Kyung Hwan Ryu" with authorship markers
    html = html.replace(/Kyung Hwan Ryu/g, function() {
      const sup = suffix ? "<sup>" + suffix + "</sup>" : "";
      return "<strong>Kyung Hwan Ryu</strong>" + sup;
    });
    html = html.replace(/Ryu, Kyung Hwan/g, function() {
      const sup = suffix ? "<sup>" + suffix + "</sup>" : "";
      return "<strong>Kyung Hwan Ryu</strong>" + sup;
    });

    // Highlight lab members in blue
    labMembers.forEach(name => {
      const escaped = name.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
      html = html.replace(new RegExp('(?<![<\\w])' + escaped + '(?![\\w>])', 'g'),
        '<span class="lab-member">' + name + '</span>');
    });

    // Add DOI link or status badge
    if (doi) {
      html = html.replace(/\s*https?:\/\/doi\.org\/<a\s[^>]*>[^<]*<\/a>\.?\s*/g, "");
      html = html.replace(/<a\s+href="https?:\/\/doi\.org\/[^"]*"[^>]*>[^<]*<\/a>\.?\s*/g, "");
      html = html.replace(/\s*https?:\/\/doi\.org\/[^\s<]+\.?\s*/g, "");
      html = html.replace(/\.\s*$/, "");
      html += '. <a href="' + doi + '" target="_blank">[LINK]</a>';
    }

    // Add status text for submitted papers
    if (status) {
      html = html.replace(/\.\s*$/, "");
      html += ', ' + status + '.';
    }

    item.div.innerHTML = html;
  }

  // Process all entries
  submitted.forEach(processEntry);
  published.forEach(processEntry);

  // Rebuild DOM
  refsDiv.innerHTML = "";
  const totalPublished = published.length;

  // Submitted section
  if (submitted.length > 0) {
    const h2 = document.createElement("h2");
    h2.textContent = "Submitted";
    h2.className = "pub-year-header";
    refsDiv.appendChild(h2);
    submitted.forEach(item => {
      refsDiv.appendChild(item.div);
    });
  }

  // Published section with year headers and index numbers
  let currentLabel = null;
  published.forEach((item, idx) => {
    const indexNum = totalPublished - idx;
    const label = item.year <= 2020 ? "~2020" : String(item.year);

    if (label !== currentLabel) {
      currentLabel = label;
      const h2 = document.createElement("h2");
      h2.textContent = label;
      h2.className = "pub-year-header";
      refsDiv.appendChild(h2);
    }

    const indexSpan = document.createElement("span");
    indexSpan.className = "pub-index";
    indexSpan.textContent = "[" + indexNum + "] ";
    item.div.insertBefore(indexSpan, item.div.firstChild);

    refsDiv.appendChild(item.div);
  });
});
</script>
```
